datapoints.description: Number of KVDB members reporting as up
datapoints.name: kvdb_up_count

datapoints.description: KVDB disk sync latency in milliseconds
datapoints.name: disk_sync_latency_ms

datapoints.description: Total number of KVDB members in the cluster

description: Portworx internal KVDB consensus health, member counts, and disk sync latency via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: KVDB health from px_kvdb_up (per-member up status, counted for online/total) and px_kvdb_disk_sync_duration_seconds (max across members, converted to ms). Disk sync latency above 1 second indicates potential consensus issues.
name: Portworx_KVDB_Health
